short_description: RSOS Volume Locked due to snapshot
close_notes:
<!-- do-not-process -->

Issue Summary: RSOS Volume Locked due to snapshot
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation:

verfied issue , executed commands

current_status_next_steps:
Incident : INC10470564
RSOS Volume Locked due to snapshot. On investigation it is found that the issue is where the computeaction was processed but not updated as expected. Patch the computeaction to mark it successful. 
Hence as per the runbook patch the computation as follow:




export NS=3af7bf0d548ebfd57b282309eab276bc
export COMPUTEACTION=SNAPSHOTr006-73c56f06-fc11-4d9a-b583-145b37348717

kubectl proxy --port 8002 &
PROXYPID=$!

curl --header "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--request PATCH \
--data '[{"op":"replace","path":"/status/actionStatus","value":"SUCCESSFUL"}]' \
http://localhost:8002/apis/compute.genesis.ibm.com/v1beta1/namespaces/$NS/computeactions/$COMPUTEACTION/status

kill $PROXYPID

 -- runbook link -- 
 https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/snapshot_stuck_pending.html#snapshot-stuck-accepted_zsnap
